headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Universal Health Services, Lowers Price Target to $195
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Jason Cassorla   maintains Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $211 to $195.
